label: Alert
description: Neutral two-note ascending chime (E5 to A5, perfect fourth).

label: Warning
description: Three quick mid pips on F#5.
intended_use: Timer approaching its end; pre-expiry warning.

label: Danger
description: Urgent low-high dissonant double hit (tritone dyad with a minor-2nd rub).
intended_use: Urgent events: death touch, gate, emote warnings that demand action.

label: Tell
description: Soft single glass ding on E6.

label: Timer end
description: Resolved descending two-note (B5 to E5, perfect fifth down).
intended_use: A tracked timer or cooldown has completed.

label: Success
intended_use: Positive events: level up, resurrection accepted, item looted.

label: Death
description: Low somber descending minor pair (C4 to A3, minor third down).

label: Tick
intended_use: Per-second countdown ticks; designed to be unobtrusive when repeated.

label: Gong
description: Deep struck gong on A2 with inharmonic partials and a long decay.
intended_use: Raid-scale events: enrage, boss spawn, raid-wide calls.

label: Holy strike
description: Descending celestial shimmer resolving into a radiant D-major chord.
intended_use: Divine damage moments such as Slay Undead.

label: Chime 2
description: Alternate ascending chime, higher pitch (G5 to C6).
intended_use: Alternate alert pitch so users can tell triggers apart by ear.

label: Chime 3
description: Alternate ascending chime, lower pitch (C5 to F5).
intended_use: Alternate alert pitch so users can tell triggers apart by ear.
